MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff UWE Dobers's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents, form and special interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $545 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
